name: GLIOMATOSIS PERITONEI
definition: benign mature glial implants throughout peritoneum

demographics.Associated with: solid / immature ovarian teratomas, ventriculoperitoneal shunts
demographics.Histo: benign mature glial tissue with delicate fibrillar processes and scattered supporting

dominant_finding: peritoneal nodules + masses of soft-tissue density
discriminating_features: peritoneal nodules + masses of soft-tissue density
adnexal / pelvic mass suggestive of teratoma
multilobular masses of homogeneously high SI on T2WI

CT: peritoneal nodules + masses of soft-tissue density
adnexal / pelvic mass suggestive of teratoma
MR: multilobular masses of homogeneously high SI on T2WI
